Quest

The Infestation: Part 4

StarterNo explicit starter body

Defeat 100 Baby Moth lvl 7, Dire Moth lvl 8, Locust lvl 7, Mature Moth lvl 8, Moth Alpha lvl 13 in Kritillian

Start Here

  • No explicit starter body was linked in Bodies.mission; this quest may start automatically, from another quest, or from a hidden trigger.

  • System: Kritillian

  • Targets: Baby Moth lvl 7, Dire Moth lvl 8, Locust lvl 7, Mature Moth lvl 8, Moth Alpha lvl 13

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Kritillian.
  2. Defeat 100 Baby Moth lvl 7, Dire Moth lvl 8, Locust lvl 7, Mature Moth lvl 8, Moth Alpha lvl 13.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Infestation: Part 5.

Quest Text

Description

Kill 100 moths to decrease the infestation rate and help Ono in her research. She believes something evil is behind the spread of the infestation and she wants to find out what it is.

Completion

According to Ono's latest research she has discovered that the Macrophagse are a vital part of the infestation. She wants to study them up close and she insists that we take her to Polueno in the Zergilin system.
